attributes.description: Dashboard 最上方的 demo 導覽圖，強調 Kafka Connect 是 Kafka 與 Elasticsearch 中間的橋樑，並標示 DLQ 壞資料分流路線。
attributes.title: Demo 導覽 - 事件旅行路線
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Demo 導覽 - 事件旅行路線","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"### Demo 導覽：Kafka Connect 是 Kafka 與 Elasticsearch 中間的橋樑

```text
+-----------+   +----------------+   +------------------+   +----------------+   +-------------+
| Generator |-->| product.events |-->| ES sink          |-->| product-events |-->| Main panels |
+-----------+   +-------+--------+   | JSON+SMT+upsert  |   | ES index       |   | + documents |
                        |            +------------------+   +----------------+   +-------------+
                        |
                        | malformed JSON
                        v
                +--------------------+   +------------------+   +--------------------+   +-----------+
                | product.events.dlq |-->| DLQ sink         |-->| product-events-dlq |-->| DLQ panel |
                | raw bad record     |   | source fields    |   | ES index           |   | bad count |
                +--------------------+   +------------------+   +--------------------+   +-----------+
```

正常事件走上方主線，形成主圖表與事件明細。壞資料從 `product.events` 分流到 `product.events.dlq`，再由 DLQ sink 寫入 `product-events-dlq`，供「Kafka Connect - DLQ 壞資料數量」panel 查詢。","openLinksInNewTab":false},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: DLQ 原始文件 - Elasticsearch 壞資料
